name: Lemon Rice and Peas
recipeIngredient: 8 chapatis or whole wheat tortillas -- warmed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring the water to a boil over high heat.
2. Add the rice and cook, covered, until the water is absorbed (about 30-40 minutes).
3. Remove from the heat.
4. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
5. Add the cumin seeds and mustard seeds; cook, stirring, until the mustard seeds begin to pop (about 30 seconds).
6. Add the green onions and cook until softened (about 1 minute).
7. Stir in the cooked rice, peas, cashews, tamari, lemon juice, parsley, turmeric, and cayenne.
8. Cook, stirring often, for 3 minutes.
9. Remove from the heat.
10. Lay a warm chapati or tortilla on a work surface. Place about 1/2 cup of the rice mixture in the center and roll up tightly around the filling.
11. Repeat with the remaining chapatis and serve immediately.
